output.error_message: Duplicate row detected during DML action (100090)

decision_log.decision: Parsed alert and queried DBT_RUN_RESULTS for error details
decision_log.rationale: Alert text contains model gpm_repeat_buyer_dim from transform_pricing__daily DAG. DBT_RUN_RESULTS confirms duplicate row error during DML action (error code 100090).

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, STATUS, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'gpm_repeat_buyer_dim' AND STATUS = 'error' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
